company.name: Cyclone
company.tagline: Build Fast. Ship Smart. Scale Fearlessly.
company.description: Cyclone is a product-first app development company founded in 2018, headquartered in Bangalore. We design and build high-performance mobile and web applications for startups, scale-ups, and Fortune 500 clients across fintech, edtech, healthtech, and e-commerce. With a team of 120+ engineers, designers, and product managers, we have shipped over 85 products used by more than 4 million users worldwide.

roles.title: Junior App Developer
roles.description: Join Cyclone's core engineering team to build mobile and web apps used by millions. You will work directly with senior engineers, contribute to real client projects from day one, and grow through structured mentorship.
responsibilities: Build and ship features for iOS, Android, and web apps
Write clean, well-documented, and testable code
Collaborate with UI/UX designers using Figma handoffs
Integrate REST APIs and Firebase services
Participate in daily standups and sprint planning
Conduct and receive peer code reviews
Debug, profile, and optimize app performance
Write unit and widget tests for your features
roles.team_structure: You will be part of a 4–6 person squad with a tech lead, senior dev, designer, and QA engineer.

roles.title: Data Analyst
roles.description: Join our Analytics team to transform raw data into actionable insights. You'll work with product teams to understand user behavior, drive data-informed decisions, and help clients optimize their applications for better performance and user engagement.
responsibilities: Analyze user behavior and product metrics using SQL and Python
Create dashboards and reports using Tableau or Power BI
Conduct A/B testing and statistical analysis
Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in large datasets
Collaborate with product and engineering teams on data strategies
Present findings and recommendations to stakeholders
Build data pipelines and automate reporting
Track KPIs and measure business impact
roles.team_structure: Work in a 3-4 person analytics team with senior analysts and data engineers.

roles.title: Frontend Engineer
roles.description: Lead the creation of beautiful, performant user interfaces. Build web applications using modern frameworks like React and TypeScript, working closely with designers to bring pixel-perfect designs to life.
responsibilities: Build responsive web applications using React and TypeScript
Implement pixel-perfect UI designs from Figma
Optimize web performance and ensure cross-browser compatibility
Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code
Collaborate with backend engineers on API integration
Participate in code reviews and architecture discussions
Debug and resolve frontend issues in production
Stay updated with latest web technologies and best practices
roles.team_structure: Work in a squad with other frontend engineers, product designers, and backend teams.

roles.title: Backend Engineer
roles.description: Design and build scalable backend systems that power Cyclone's applications. You'll work on APIs, databases, and cloud infrastructure serving millions of users across fintech, edtech, and other domains.
responsibilities: Design and implement RESTful APIs and microservices
Build robust database schemas and optimize queries
Work with cloud platforms like AWS or Google Cloud
Implement authentication, security, and data validation
Write clean, maintainable code with comprehensive testing
Collaborate on system design and architecture decisions
Monitor, debug, and optimize backend performance
Participate in on-call rotation for production support
roles.team_structure: Join a team of backend engineers working on multiple client projects.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.description: Build and maintain the infrastructure that powers Cyclone's applications. Manage CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and ensure reliable, secure deployments across multiple environments.
responsibilities: Design and implement CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitLab
Manage cloud infrastructure on AWS/GCP
Containerize applications and manage Kubernetes clusters
Implement monitoring, logging, and alerting systems
Ensure security best practices and compliance
Automate infrastructure provisioning using Terraform
Troubleshoot and resolve infrastructure issues
Collaborate with engineering teams on deployment strategies
roles.team_structure: Work in a 3-5 person DevOps team supporting all engineering squads.

roles.title: Quality Assurance Engineer
roles.description: Ensure the quality of Cyclone's applications through comprehensive testing strategies. Work with development teams to identify bugs, improve test coverage, and maintain high quality standards.
responsibilities: Create and execute comprehensive test plans and test cases
Perform manual and automated testing on web and mobile apps
Write automated tests using Selenium, Jest, or similar tools
Identify, report, and track bugs with clear documentation
Collaborate with developers on quality improvements
Perform performance and load testing
Maintain test documentation and automation frameworks
Support continuous integration and deployment processes
roles.team_structure: Work with development squads as a dedicated QA engineer.

roles.title: UI/UX Designer
roles.description: Craft beautiful, intuitive user experiences for mobile and web applications. Collaborate with product and engineering teams to design interfaces that users love and that drive business results.
responsibilities: Create wireframes, mockups, and prototypes using Figma
Design responsive user interfaces for web and mobile platforms
Conduct user research and usability testing
Create and maintain design systems and component libraries
Collaborate with product managers on user requirements
Iterate on designs based on user feedback
Document design decisions and design specs
Stay updated with design trends and best practices
roles.team_structure: Work in a design team of 3-4 designers supporting multiple product teams.

roles.title: Product Manager
roles.description: Drive the strategy and direction of Cyclone's products. Work with engineering, design, and stakeholders to define product vision, prioritize features, and deliver solutions that solve real user problems.
responsibilities: Define product vision, strategy, and roadmap
Conduct market research and competitive analysis
Gather and prioritize user requirements
Create product specifications and user stories
Collaborate with design and engineering on execution
Analyze product metrics and user feedback
Manage product lifecycle from conception to launch
Present product updates to stakeholders and clients
roles.team_structure: Work as a PM with dedicated engineering and design squads.

job_details.work_mode: Hybrid — 3 days in office (Tue, Wed, Thu), 2 days remote
job_details.office_address: Cyclone HQ, 4th Floor, Prestige Tech Park, Marathahalli, Bangalore – 560037
job_details.salary_fulltime: ₹4.5 LPA – ₹13 LPA (based on role and skills)

perks: MacBook Pro provided from day one
Access to Udemy, Coursera, and internal tech talks
ESOPs for full-time hires after 1 year

application.referral: Employee referrals are given priority. Ask your referrer to email hr@cyclone.io.

assessment.tip: Practice arrays, strings, and basic recursion. The UI task involves building a simple screen in Flutter or React Native.

hiring_process: Resume Screening → Online Coding Assessment (90 min) → Technical Interview (60 min) → Culture Fit Round (30 min) → Offer Letter
hiring_timeline: Typically 2–3 weeks from application to offer.

eligibility.education: B.Tech / BCA / B.Sc in Computer Science, IT, or related field
eligibility.experience: 0–2 years (freshers with strong projects are welcome)
eligibility.cgpa: No minimum CGPA requirement — we care about skills, not scores
eligibility.backlog_policy: Active backlogs are not preferred, but past cleared backlogs are fine

culture.work_style: Agile sprints (2-week cycles). You own your features end-to-end.
culture.growth: Engineers at Cyclone are promoted based on output and ownership, not tenure. Average time to mid-level: 18 months.
culture.diversity: 40% of our engineering team identifies as women. We are an equal opportunity employer.

what_to_expect: Code walkthrough of your own project (10–15 min)
Basic system design question (e.g., design a URL shortener)
common_questions: Explain your most complex project end-to-end.
What is the difference between StatefulWidget and StatelessWidget in Flutter?
How do you handle state management in your apps?
Explain REST API and how you've used it in a project.
What is the difference between Git merge and Git rebase?
How would you optimize a slow Flutter app?
What is async/await and how does it work in Dart?
Explain the difference between SQL and NoSQL databases.

what_to_expect: Discussion on how you handle feedback and failure
common_questions: Tell me about a time you took ownership of a failing project.
How do you handle tight deadlines?
Describe a situation where you disagreed with a teammate.
Why do you want to join Cyclone over other companies?
Where do you see yourself in 2 years?

preparation_tips: Revise arrays, strings, linked lists, and basic recursion before the coding round.
Be ready to explain every line of your project — interviewers go deep.
Practice the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result) for behavioral questions.
Read about Cyclone's past projects and clients before the culture fit round.
Know your state management approach — BLoC, Provider, or Riverpod.
Prepare 2–3 questions to ask the interviewer — it shows genuine interest.

small.response: We have 8 open positions: Junior App Developer, Data Analyst, Frontend Engineer, Backend Engineer, DevOps Engineer, QA Engineer, UI/UX Designer, and Product Manager. All roles are in Bangalore with hybrid work mode.
Salary ranges: Junior App Dev ₹4.5-7LPA, Data Analyst ₹5-8LPA, Frontend ₹5-9LPA, Backend ₹6-10LPA, DevOps ₹7-11LPA, QA ₹4-6.5LPA, UI/UX ₹5-8.5LPA, PM ₹8-13LPA. Internship: ₹15-20K/month.
Internship stipend: ₹15,000 – ₹20,000/month based on performance. Interns get MacBook, learning budget, and potential conversion to full-time.
Office: Cyclone HQ, 4th Floor, Prestige Tech Park, Marathahalli, Bangalore – 560037. Well connected by metro (Purple Line).
Hybrid model: Tue, Wed, Thu in-office. Mon & Fri remote. Core hours: 11am-4pm. Flexible outside core hours.
We accept applications on rolling basis. Apply soon as positions fill fast. Shortlisting within 5 business days.
No bond, no service agreement, no lock-in. We believe good work and good culture retain people — not contracts.
No minimum CGPA requirement — we care about skills, not scores. Active backlogs not preferred, but past cleared backlogs are fine.
Yes! Freshers with strong projects are welcome for Junior App Developer role. A degree alone won't get you in — but great portfolio will.
Experience varies by role: Junior App Dev 0-2 yrs, Data Analyst 1-3 yrs, Frontend 1-3 yrs, Backend 1-4 yrs, DevOps 2-5 yrs, QA 1-3 yrs, UI/UX 1-3 yrs, PM 2-5 yrs.
Apply at: https://cyclone.io/careers/apply. Submit resume + link to at least one project (GitHub, Play Store, App Store, or portfolio).
Contact: careers@cyclone.io. For referrals, ask your referrer to email hr@cyclone.io.
MacBook Pro provided from day one for all engineers.
Perks: MacBook Pro, ₹10K annual learning budget, health insurance, flexible hours, team off-sites, free lunch, ESOPs after 1 year.
Tech: Flutter, Dart, React Native, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, AWS, Docker, PostgreSQL, Firebase.

medium.response:
Our hiring process:
1) Resume Screening (5 business days)
2) Technical Assessment - 90 min on HackerEarth
3) Technical Interview - 60 min (project walkthrough + DSA)
4) Culture Fit Round - 30 min (HR + senior engineer)

Total timeline: 2-3 weeks. Each stage has clear feedback.

patterns: tell me about junior app developer

Data Analyst role:

Frontend Engineer role:

Skills: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, CSS, HTML

Backend Engineer role:

• Build robust database schemas

DevOps Engineer role:

• Manage cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP)

QA Engineer role:
• Create & execute test plans & cases
• Perform manual & automated testing
• Write automated tests (Selenium, Jest)

• Experience: 1-3 years

Skills: Test Automation, SQL, Manual Testing, Selenium, API Testing

UI/UX Designer role:
• Create wireframes, mockups, prototypes (Figma)
• Design responsive interfaces for web & mobile
• Conduct user research & usability testing
• Create design systems & component libraries
• Salary: ₹5-8.5 LPA
• Experience: 1-3 years

Skills: Figma, Prototyping, User Research, Wireframing

Product Manager role:
• Define product vision, strategy, roadmap
• Conduct market research & competitive analysis
• Gather & prioritize user requirements
• Manage product lifecycle
• Salary: ₹8-13 LPA
• Experience: 2-5 years

Skills: Product Strategy, Data Analysis, Figma, SQL, Communication

Technical Assessment details:
• Platform: HackerEarth
• Duration: 90 minutes
• Topics: Data Structures, Algorithms, Flutter/JS basics
• Plus: 1 take-home UI task
• Difficulty: Easy to Medium

Tip: Practice arrays, strings, basic recursion. UI task: build simple screen in Flutter or React Native.

Technical Interview (60 min):
• Format: Conversational — not a whiteboard quiz
• Code walkthrough of your project (10-15 min)
• 1-2 DSA problems (arrays, strings, recursion)
• Basic system design question
• Role-specific concept questions

Bring a working demo or GitHub link of your best project. Be ready to explain every line.

Culture Fit Round (30 min):
• Format: HR + one senior engineer
• Behavioral questions using STAR format
• Questions about ownership & accountability
• Discussion on handling feedback & failure
• Why Cyclone specifically

Prepare 2-3 questions to ask interviewer — shows genuine interest.

Preparation Tips:
• Revise arrays, strings, linked lists, recursion
• Be ready to explain every line of your project
• Practice STAR method for behavioral questions
• Read about Cyclone's projects before interview
• Know your state management approach
• Prepare questions to ask interviewer

Do: Bring working demo, be honest about gaps, show enthusiasm.
Don't: Memorize answers, bad-mouth previous companies, stay silent if stuck.

Our Culture:
• Values: Ownership over blame, Ship fast iterate faster, Radical transparency, Customer obsession
• Work Style: Agile sprints (2-week cycles). You own features end-to-end.
• Growth: Promoted based on output, not tenure. Avg time to mid-level: 18 months.
• Diversity: 40% women in engineering. Equal opportunity employer.

Skills by Role:
• Junior App Dev: Flutter, Dart, React Native, Firebase, REST APIs
• Data Analyst: SQL, Python, Tableau, Power BI, Statistics
• Frontend: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, CSS
• Backend: Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, AWS
• DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, CI/CD, Terraform
• QA: Test Automation, Selenium, API Testing
• UI/UX: Figma, Prototyping, User Research
• PM: Product Strategy, Data Analysis, SQL

big.response:
About Cyclone:

Cyclone is a product-first app development company founded in 2018, headquartered in Bangalore. We design and build high-performance mobile and web applications for startups, scale-ups, and Fortune 500 clients across fintech, edtech, healthtech, e-commerce, and SaaS.

With a team of 120+ engineers, designers, and product managers, we have shipped over 85 products used by more than 4 million users worldwide.

Our tagline: 'Build Fast. Ship Smart. Scale Fearlessly.'

We're a premium tech studio, not just a service company. We work with clients like fintech unicorns, leading edtech platforms, and healthcare innovators.

For more details, visit: https://cyclone.io

Complete Job Descriptions:

1) Junior App Developer (₹4.5-7 LPA, 0-2 yrs)
Build mobile/web apps using Flutter, React Native. Write clean code, integrate APIs, work in squads. Skills: Flutter, Dart, Firebase, REST APIs.

2) Data Analyst (₹5-8 LPA, 1-3 yrs)
Analyze user behavior, create dashboards, conduct A/B testing. Skills: SQL, Python, Tableau, Power BI.

3) Frontend Engineer (₹5-9 LPA, 1-3 yrs)
Build React/TypeScript web apps, implement Figma designs. Skills: React, TypeScript, CSS.

4) Backend Engineer (₹6-10 LPA, 1-4 yrs)
Design APIs & microservices, build databases, work with AWS. Skills: Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL.

5) DevOps Engineer (₹7-11 LPA, 2-5 yrs)
Manage CI/CD, cloud infrastructure, Kubernetes. Skills: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform.

6) QA Engineer (₹4-6.5 LPA, 1-3 yrs)
Create test plans, perform testing, write automation. Skills: Selenium, API Testing.

7) UI/UX Designer (₹5-8.5 LPA, 1-3 yrs)
Create wireframes, prototypes, design systems. Skills: Figma, User Research.

8) Product Manager (₹8-13 LPA, 2-5 yrs)
Define product vision, roadmap, collaborate with teams. Skills: Product Strategy, SQL.

All roles: Hybrid (Tue-Thu office), MacBook Pro, health insurance, learning budget.

Complete Hiring Process:

Stage 1: Resume Screening (5 business days)
- Submit resume + project links (GitHub, Play Store, App Store, or portfolio)
- Shortlisted candidates contacted within 5 days
- Ensure your resume highlights relevant skills and projects

Stage 2: Technical Assessment (90 minutes on HackerEarth)
- Data Structures & Algorithms questions
- Flutter/React Native basics
- 1 take-home UI task
- Difficulty: Easy to Medium
- Practice: arrays, strings, basic recursion

Stage 3: Technical Interview (60 minutes)
- Conversational format — not a whiteboard quiz
- Code walkthrough of your project (10-15 min)
- 1-2 DSA problems (arrays, strings, recursion)
- Basic system design question
- Role-specific concept questions

Stage 4: Culture Fit Round (30 minutes)
- HR + one senior engineer
- Behavioral questions using STAR format
- Questions about ownership & accountability
- Discussion on handling feedback & failure
- Why Cyclone specifically

Total Timeline: 2-3 weeks from application to offer.

Each stage has clear feedback. If not selected, we provide constructive feedback to help you improve.

Eligibility Criteria:

Education:
• B.Tech / BCA / B.Sc in Computer Science, IT, or related field
• We also consider candidates from other backgrounds with strong tech skills

Experience:
• Varies by role (0-5 years as specified in job descriptions)
• Freshers welcome for Junior App Developer role

Academic:
• No minimum CGPA requirement — we care about skills, not scores
• Active backlogs: Not preferred
• Past cleared backlogs: Fine

What we value more than credentials:
• Strong portfolio with working projects
• Problem-solving ability
• Good communication skills
• Eagerness to learn and grow
• Ownership mindset

Note: A degree alone won't get you in — but great portfolio will!

Complete Salary & Compensation:

Full-Time Salaries (annual):
• Junior App Developer: ₹4.5 LPA – ₹7 LPA
• Data Analyst: ₹5 LPA – ₹8 LPA
• Frontend Engineer: ₹5 LPA – ₹9 LPA
• Backend Engineer: ₹6 LPA – ₹10 LPA
• DevOps Engineer: ₹7 LPA – ₹11 LPA
• QA Engineer: ₹4 LPA – ₹6.5 LPA
• UI/UX Designer: ₹5 LPA – ₹8.5 LPA
• Product Manager: ₹8 LPA – ₹13 LPA

Internship:
• Stipend: ₹15,000 – ₹20,000/month
• Duration: 6 months
• Perks: MacBook, learning budget
• Conversion: Performance-based full-time offer

Factors affecting salary:
• Role and experience level
• Interview performance
• Skills match with role requirements
• Project portfolio quality

Note: Final offer depends on interview performance. We also have ESOPs for full-time hires after 1 year.

For detailed compensation discussion, apply at https://cyclone.io/careers/apply

Complete Employee Benefits:

💻 Equipment:
• MacBook Pro provided from day one
• All necessary software licenses

📚 Learning:
• ₹10,000 annual learning & certification budget
• Access to Udemy, Coursera
• Internal tech talks and knowledge sessions

🏥 Health:
• Health insurance for employee + 1 dependent
• Regular health check-ups

⏰ Work Flexibility:
• Hybrid work model (Tue-Thu office, Mon & Fri remote)
• Flexible work hours (core hours 11am-4pm)
• Work from home options

🎉 Culture:
• Team off-sites twice a year
• Free lunch on office days
• Agile sprints with collaborative environment

📈 Growth:
• Promoted based on output and ownership, not tenure
• Average time to mid-level: 18 months
• Structured mentorship programs

💰 Long-term:
• ESOPs for full-time hires after 1 year
• Performance bonuses

Note: Benefits may vary slightly by role and tenure. Contact HR for complete details.

Our Core Values:

1) Ownership over Blame
• We take responsibility for our work
• Mistakes are learning opportunities, not blame games
• Every team member owns their deliverables end-to-end

2) Ship Fast, Iterate Faster
• We believe in rapid prototyping and iteration
• Better to ship and learn than perfect indefinitely
• Continuous improvement is in our DNA

3) Radical Transparency
• Open communication across all levels
• Share wins, failures, and learnings openly
• No hidden agendas or politics

4) Customer Obsession
• Users are at the center of every decision
• We build products that solve real problems
• Success is measured by customer impact

Work Style:
• Agile sprints (2-week cycles)
• You own your features end-to-end
• Collaborative squad model

Diversity & Inclusion:
• 40% of engineering team identifies as women
• Equal opportunity employer
• Inclusive hiring practices

Career Growth at Cyclone:

Promotion Philosophy:
• Engineers are promoted based on output and ownership, not tenure
• Average time to mid-level: 18 months
• Clear performance metrics and expectations

Career Levels:
• Junior (0-2 years): Learn fundamentals, work on features
• Mid-level (2-4 years): Own modules, mentor juniors
• Senior (4-6 years): Lead projects, architectural decisions
• Lead/Principal (6+ years): Technical direction, team building

Growth Pathways:
1) Technical Track:
   Junior Dev → Mid Dev → Senior Dev → Tech Lead → Principal Engineer

2) Management Track:
   Junior Dev → Senior Dev → Team Lead → Engineering Manager → Director

3) Specialist Track:
   Domain expertise in areas like DevOps, Data, Security

Support for Growth:
• Structured mentorship from senior engineers
• ₹10,000 annual learning budget for certifications
• Access to internal tech talks
• Exposure to diverse client projects
• Regular 1:1s with managers for career planning

Team Structure at Cyclone:

Engineering Squads (4-6 people):
• 1 Tech Lead (guides technical decisions)
• 1-2 Senior Developers (code reviews, mentorship)
• 1-2 Junior/Mid Developers (feature development)
• 1 Designer (UI/UX)
• 1 QA Engineer (quality assurance)

You will work directly with:
• Senior engineers for mentorship
• Product managers for requirements
• Designers for implementation
• QA for testing

Analytics Team (3-4 people):
• Senior analysts
• Data engineers
• Collaboration with product teams

Design Team (3-4 designers):
• Supporting multiple product teams
• Wireframes, prototypes, design systems

DevOps Team (3-5 people):
• Supporting all engineering squads
• CI/CD, cloud infrastructure, monitoring

Daily Operations:
• Daily standups (15 min)
• Sprint planning (bi-weekly)
• Code reviews (mandatory)
• Retrospectives (bi-weekly)

You'll own your features end-to-end and have direct access to senior team members for guidance.

Technology Stack at Cyclone:

Mobile Development:
• Flutter & Dart (primary)
• React Native (secondary)
• Firebase (backend-as-a-service)
• REST APIs integration

Web Development:
• React & TypeScript (primary)
• Angular (some projects)
• HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript
• State management: Redux, Context API

Backend:
• Node.js with Express
• Python (Django, Flask)
• Java (select projects)
• RESTful API design

Databases:
• PostgreSQL (primary)
• MongoDB (NoSQL projects)
• Firebase Firestore
• Redis (caching)

Cloud & Infrastructure:
• Amazon Web Services (AWS)
• Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
• Docker containerization
• Kubernetes orchestration
• Terraform (IaC)

DevOps:
• Jenkins (CI/CD)
• GitLab CI
• Git for version control
• Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana

Tools:
• IDEs: VS Code, Android Studio
• Design: Figma
• Project Management: Jira, Confluence
• Communication: Slack, Zoom

We're tech-agnostic — we adopt the best tool for each job!

Internship Program Details:

Duration: 6 months

Stipend: ₹15,000 – ₹20,000/month (based on performance)

What You'll Do:
• Work on real client projects
• Get structured mentorship
• Learn industry best practices
• Build a strong portfolio

Perks During Internship:
• MacBook Pro for work
• ₹10,000 learning budget (pro-rated)
• Free lunch on office days
• Flexible hours

After Internship:
• Performance-based conversion to full-time
• Salary: ₹4.5-7 LPA (based on performance)
• All full-time benefits from day one

Who Should Apply:
• B.Tech/BCA/B.Sc final year or recent graduates
• Strong interest in mobile/web development
• Basic programming knowledge
• Eagerness to learn

How to Apply:
• Apply at https://cyclone.io/careers/apply
• Mention 'Internship' in subject line
• Include any projects you've built

Note: Internship positions fill fast. Apply early!

Work-Life Balance at Cyclone:

Working Hours:
• Core hours: 11am – 4pm (everyone available)
• Flexible outside core hours
• Best for deep work: mornings

Office Days (Hybrid):
• Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday — in office
• Monday, Friday — remote/work from home

Leave Policy:
• Annual leave as per company policy
• Sick leave available
• Optional: flexible vacation approach

What Helps Work-Life Balance:
✅ No unnecessary meetings
✅ Agile sprints reduce overtime
✅ Ownership model means no micro-management
✅ Remote days reduce commute stress
✅ Team off-sites for bonding

Note: During sprint deadlines, some extra hours may be needed. But we believe in sustainable pace, not crunch culture.

Diversity & Inclusion at Cyclone:

Our Diversity Stats:
• 40% of engineering team identifies as women
• Team members from 15+ different cities
• Diverse educational backgrounds (NITs, state colleges, bootcamps)

Equal Opportunity:
• We are an equal opportunity employer
• No discrimination based on gender, caste, religion, sexual orientation
• Hiring based on skills and potential, not pedigree

Inclusion Initiatives:
• Safe workspace policies
• Flexible leave for new parents
• Mentorship programs for underrepresented groups
• Regular DEI awareness sessions

What We Look For:
• Skills over degrees
• Problem-solving ability
• Growth mindset
• Collaboration spirit

We believe diverse teams build better products. Different perspectives lead to better solutions for all users.

Why Join Cyclone?

1) Real Project Experience
• From day one, work on live client projects
• Not bench time or fake projects
• Ship products used by millions

2) Mentorship & Growth
• Structured mentorship from senior engineers
• Fast-track your career (avg 18 months to mid-level)
• ₹10,000 annual learning budget

3) Modern Tech Stack
• Work with Flutter, React, AWS, Kubernetes
• Stay current with industry trends
• Tech-agnostic — best tool for each job

4) Great Culture
• Ownership over blame
• Radical transparency
• No politics, just shipping

5) Competitive Compensation
• Salaries ₹4.5-13 LPA based on role
• MacBook Pro, health insurance
• ESOPs after 1 year

6) Work-Life Balance
• Hybrid model (3 days office, 2 remote)
• Flexible hours
• No crunch culture

7) Impact
• 85+ products shipped
• 4+ million users
• Work across fintech, edtech, healthtech

Join us if you want to build, learn, and grow!

fallback.contact_message: For more detailed information, please contact our HR team at careers@cyclone.io or visit https://cyclone.io/careers/apply
